parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE($1::boolean, false) AS auth_ok,
    COALESCE($2::int, 0) AS auth_user_id,
    COALESCE($3::int, 0) AS barberia_id,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($4::text, '')), '') AS slug_input,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($5::text, '')), '') AS nombre,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($6::text, '')), '') AS telefono,
    NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE($7::text, ''))), '') AS admin_email,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($8::text, '')), '') AS direccion,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($9::text, '')), '') AS ciudad,
    GREATEST(5, COALESCE($10::int, 15)) AS slot_min
),
auth_user AS (
  SELECT u.id, u.email
  FROM public.usuarios u
  JOIN input i ON u.id = i.auth_user_id
  WHERE i.auth_ok = true
  LIMIT 1
),
owned_existing AS (
  SELECT b.id, b.slug
  FROM public.barberias b
  JOIN input i ON b.id = i.barberia_id
  JOIN auth_user au ON b.owner_id = au.id
  WHERE i.barberia_id > 0
    AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
  LIMIT 1
),
clean AS (
  SELECT
    i.*,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(regexp_replace(lower(trim(i.slug_input)), '[^a-z0-9]+', '-', 'g'), ''),
      NULLIF(regexp_replace(lower(trim(i.nombre)), '[^a-z0-9]+', '-', 'g'), ''),
      'barberia'
    ) AS base_slug
  FROM input i
),
final_slug AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM owned_existing)
      THEN (SELECT slug FROM owned_existing LIMIT 1)
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.barberias b WHERE b.slug = clean.base_slug)
      THEN clean.base_slug || '-' || substring(md5(random()::text), 1, 6)
    ELSE clean.base_slug
  END AS slug
  FROM clean
),
updated AS (
  UPDATE public.barberias b
  SET
    nombre = COALESCE(c.nombre, b.nombre),
    email_contacto = COALESCE(c.admin_email, au.email, b.email_contacto),
    telefono = COALESCE(c.telefono, b.telefono, ''),
    direccion = COALESCE(c.direccion, b.direccion),
    ciudad = COALESCE(c.ciudad, b.ciudad),
    slot_min = COALESCE(c.slot_min, b.slot_min, 15)
  FROM clean c
  CROSS JOIN auth_user au
  CROSS JOIN owned_existing oe
  WHERE b.id = oe.id
  RETURNING b.id, b.slug, b.nombre, b.owner_id, b.slot_min, b.direccion, b.ciudad
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.barberias
    (nombre, slug, email_contacto, telefono, direccion, ciudad, slot_min, estado, owner_id, created_at)
  SELECT
    COALESCE(c.nombre, 'Barberia'),
    fs.slug,
    COALESCE(c.admin_email, au.email),
    COALESCE(c.telefono, ''),
    c.direccion,
    c.ciudad,
    c.slot_min,
    'activa',
    au.id,
    NOW()
  FROM clean c
  JOIN auth_user au ON true
  CROSS JOIN final_slug fs
  WHERE c.barberia_id <= 0
  RETURNING id, slug, nombre, owner_id, slot_min, direccion, ciudad
),
result AS (
  SELECT * FROM updated
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM inserted
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT true FROM result LIMIT 1), false) AS ok,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT (SELECT auth_ok FROM input LIMIT 1) THEN 'Sesion no valida'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM auth_user) THEN 'Usuario de sesion no encontrado'
    WHEN (SELECT barberia_id FROM input LIMIT 1) > 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM owned_existing) THEN 'La barberia no pertenece al usuario de sesion'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM result) THEN 'No se pudo crear o actualizar barberia'
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated) THEN 'Barberia actualizada'
    ELSE 'Barberia creada'
  END AS message,
  (SELECT id FROM result LIMIT 1) AS id,
  (SELECT slug FROM result LIMIT 1) AS slug,
  (SELECT nombre FROM result LIMIT 1) AS nombre,
  (SELECT owner_id FROM result LIMIT 1) AS owner_id,
  (SELECT slot_min FROM result LIMIT 1) AS slot_min,
  (SELECT direccion FROM result LIMIT 1) AS direccion,
  (SELECT ciudad FROM result LIMIT 1) AS ciudad;

UPDATE barberias
SET logo_url = $1
WHERE id = $2

parameters.responseBody: ={{ $node["Crear barberia"].json.ok ? { success: true, ok: true, message: "Barberia registrada correctamente", barberia_id: $node["Crear barberia"].json.id, slug: $node["Crear barberia"].json.slug, owner_id: $node["Crear barberia"].json.owner_id } : { success: false, ok: false, message: $node["Crear barberia"].json.message } }}

parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    $1::int AS barberia_id,
    COALESCE($2::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) AS draft
),
valid_input AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM input
  WHERE barberia_id > 0
),
admin_data AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(draft->'accesos'->'admin'->>'nombre', draft->'admin'->>'nombre', '')), '') AS nombre,
    NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(draft->'accesos'->'admin'->>'email', draft->'admin'->>'email', ''))), '') AS email,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(draft->'accesos'->'admin'->>'password', draft->'admin'->>'password', '')), '') AS password
  FROM valid_input
),
admin_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.usuarios (nombre, email, role, password_hash)
  SELECT
    COALESCE(nombre, 'Administrador'),
    email,
    'admin',
    CASE WHEN password IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE public.fn_password_hash(password) END
  FROM admin_data
  WHERE email IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE
  SET
    nombre = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.nombre, ''), public.usuarios.nombre),
    role = 'admin',
    password_hash = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.password_hash, public.usuarios.password_hash)
  RETURNING id, nombre, email, role
),
owner_update AS (
  SELECT b.id, b.slug, b.owner_id
  FROM public.barberias b
  JOIN valid_input i ON b.id = i.barberia_id
  LIMIT 1
),
service_cleanup AS (
  DELETE FROM public.servicios s
  USING valid_input i
  WHERE s.barberia_id = i.barberia_id
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.citas c WHERE c.barberia_id = i.barberia_id)
  RETURNING s.id
),
service_cleanup_guard AS (
  SELECT count(*) AS total FROM service_cleanup
),
service_rows AS (
  SELECT
    i.barberia_id,
    NULLIF(trim(item->>'nombre'), '') AS nombre,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(item->>'duracion_min', '')::int, 30) AS duracion_min,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(item->>'precio', '')::numeric, 0) AS precio,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'imagen_url', item->>'image_url', item->>'foto', '')), ''), NULL) AS imagen_url
  FROM valid_input i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(i.draft->'servicios', '[]'::jsonb)) item
),
services_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.servicios (barberia_id, nombre, duracion_min, precio, activo, imagen_url)
  SELECT barberia_id, nombre, duracion_min, precio, true, imagen_url
  FROM service_rows
  WHERE nombre IS NOT NULL
  RETURNING id
),
hour_rows AS (
  SELECT
    i.barberia_id,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(item->>'dia_semana', '')::int,
      CASE lower(trim(COALESCE(item->>'dia', item->>'day', '')))
        WHEN 'domingo' THEN 0
        WHEN 'dom' THEN 0
        WHEN 'sunday' THEN 0
        WHEN 'lunes' THEN 1
        WHEN 'lun' THEN 1
        WHEN 'monday' THEN 1
        WHEN 'martes' THEN 2
        WHEN 'mar' THEN 2
        WHEN 'tuesday' THEN 2
        WHEN 'miercoles' THEN 3
        WHEN 'miércoles' THEN 3
        WHEN 'mie' THEN 3
        WHEN 'mié' THEN 3
        WHEN 'wednesday' THEN 3
        WHEN 'jueves' THEN 4
        WHEN 'jue' THEN 4
        WHEN 'thursday' THEN 4
        WHEN 'viernes' THEN 5
        WHEN 'vie' THEN 5
        WHEN 'friday' THEN 5
        WHEN 'sabado' THEN 6
        WHEN 'sábado' THEN 6
        WHEN 'sab' THEN 6
        WHEN 'sáb' THEN 6
        WHEN 'saturday' THEN 6
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ) AS dia_semana,
    COALESCE((item->>'activo')::boolean, true) AS activo,
    NULLIF(trim(item->>'hora_abre'), '')::time AS hora_abre,
    NULLIF(trim(item->>'hora_cierra'), '')::time AS hora_cierra
  FROM valid_input i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(i.draft->'horarios', '[]'::jsonb)) item
),
hours_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.horarios (barberia_id, dia_semana, activo, hora_abre, hora_cierra)
  SELECT barberia_id, dia_semana, activo, hora_abre, hora_cierra
  FROM hour_rows
  WHERE dia_semana BETWEEN 0 AND 6 AND hora_abre IS NOT NULL AND hora_cierra IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (barberia_id, dia_semana)
  DO UPDATE SET
    activo = EXCLUDED.activo,
    hora_abre = EXCLUDED.hora_abre,
    hora_cierra = EXCLUDED.hora_cierra
  RETURNING id
),
barber_cleanup AS (
  DELETE FROM public.barberos b
  USING valid_input i
  WHERE b.barberia_id = i.barberia_id
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.citas c WHERE c.barberia_id = i.barberia_id)
  RETURNING b.id
),
barber_cleanup_guard AS (
  SELECT count(*) AS total FROM barber_cleanup
),
barber_access AS (
  SELECT
    row_number() OVER () AS rn,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'nombre', item->>'name', '')), '') AS nombre,
    NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(item->>'email', ''))), '') AS email,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'password', '')), '') AS password,
    COALESCE((item->>'activo')::boolean, true) AS activo,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'foto_url', item->>'foto', item->>'avatar_url', '')), ''), NULL) AS foto_url
  FROM valid_input i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(i.draft->'accesos'->'barberos', i.draft->'barberos', '[]'::jsonb)) item
),
barber_access_distinct AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (email)
    nombre,
    email,
    password
  FROM barber_access
  WHERE email IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY email, rn
),
barber_users AS (
  INSERT INTO public.usuarios (nombre, email, role, password_hash)
  SELECT
    COALESCE(nombre, 'Barbero'),
    email,
    'barbero',
    CASE WHEN password IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE public.fn_password_hash(password) END
  FROM barber_access_distinct
  ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE
  SET
    nombre = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.nombre, ''), public.usuarios.nombre),
    role = 'barbero',
    password_hash = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.password_hash, public.usuarios.password_hash)
  RETURNING id, nombre, email, role
),
unlink_previous_barbers AS (
  UPDATE public.barberos b
  SET usuario_id = NULL
  FROM barber_users bu, valid_input i
  WHERE b.usuario_id = bu.id
    AND b.barberia_id <> i.barberia_id
  RETURNING b.id, b.nombre, b.barberia_id
),
unlink_guard AS (
  SELECT count(*) AS total FROM unlink_previous_barbers
),
barber_rows AS (
  SELECT
    i.barberia_id,
    ba.nombre,
    ba.activo,
    ba.foto_url,
    bu.id AS usuario_id
  FROM valid_input i
  JOIN barber_access ba ON true
  LEFT JOIN barber_users bu ON bu.email = ba.email
  CROSS JOIN unlink_guard ug
  WHERE ba.nombre IS NOT NULL
),
barbers_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.barberos (barberia_id, nombre, activo, foto_url, usuario_id)
  SELECT barberia_id, nombre, activo, foto_url, usuario_id
  FROM barber_rows
  RETURNING id, nombre, usuario_id
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'ok', true,
  'barberia', (SELECT row_to_json(owner_update) FROM owner_update LIMIT 1),
  'admin', (SELECT row_to_json(admin_upsert) FROM admin_upsert LIMIT 1),
  'servicios_insertados', (SELECT count(*) FROM services_insert),
  'horarios_insertados', (SELECT count(*) FROM hours_insert),
  'barberos_insertados', (SELECT count(*) FROM barbers_insert),
  'barberos_linked', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(barbers_insert) FROM barbers_insert), '[]'::json),
  'message', 'Fuente de verdad sincronizada'
) AS result;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [Number($node["Crear barberia"].json["id"] ?? 0), JSON.stringify($node["Code - session claims"].json.draft ?? $node["Code - session claims"].json ?? {})] }}

parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE($1::boolean, false) AS auth_ok,
    COALESCE($2::int, 0) AS auth_user_id,
    COALESCE($3::int, 0) AS barberia_id,

auth_user AS (

  JOIN auth_user au ON b.owner_id = au.id
  WHERE i.barberia_id > 0
    AND b.deleted_at IS NULL

clean AS (
  SELECT
    i.*,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(regexp_replace(lower(trim(i.slug_input)), '[^a-z0-9]+', '-', 'g'), ''),
      NULLIF(regexp_replace(lower(trim(i.nombre)), '[^a-z0-9]+', '-', 'g'), ''),

    ) AS base_slug
  FROM input i

final_slug AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM owned_existing)
      THEN (SELECT slug FROM owned_existing LIMIT 1)
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.barberias b WHERE b.slug = clean.base_slug)
      THEN clean.base_slug || '-' || substring(md5(random()::text), 1, 6)
    ELSE clean.base_slug
  END AS slug
  FROM clean
),
updated AS (
  UPDATE public.barberias b
  SET
    nombre = COALESCE(c.nombre, b.nombre),
    email_contacto = COALESCE(c.admin_email, au.email, b.email_contacto),
    telefono = COALESCE(c.telefono, b.telefono, ''),
    direccion = COALESCE(c.direccion, b.direccion),
    ciudad = COALESCE(c.ciudad, b.ciudad),
    slot_min = COALESCE(c.slot_min, b.slot_min, 15)
  FROM clean c
  CROSS JOIN auth_user au
  CROSS JOIN owned_existing oe
  WHERE b.id = oe.id
  RETURNING b.id, b.slug, b.nombre, b.owner_id, b.slot_min, b.direccion, b.ciudad
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.barberias
    (nombre, slug, email_contacto, telefono, direccion, ciudad, slot_min, estado, owner_id, created_at)
  SELECT
    COALESCE(c.nombre, 'Barberia'),
    fs.slug,
    COALESCE(c.admin_email, au.email),
    COALESCE(c.telefono, ''),
    c.direccion,
    c.ciudad,
    c.slot_min,
    'activa',
    au.id,
    NOW()
  FROM clean c
  JOIN auth_user au ON true
  CROSS JOIN final_slug fs
  WHERE c.barberia_id <= 0
  RETURNING id, slug, nombre, owner_id, slot_min, direccion, ciudad
),
result AS (
  SELECT * FROM updated
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM inserted
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT true FROM result LIMIT 1), false) AS ok,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT (SELECT auth_ok FROM input LIMIT 1) THEN 'Sesion no valida'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM auth_user) THEN 'Usuario de sesion no encontrado'
    WHEN (SELECT barberia_id FROM input LIMIT 1) > 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM owned_existing) THEN 'La barberia no pertenece al usuario de sesion'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM result) THEN 'No se pudo crear o actualizar barberia'
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated) THEN 'Barberia actualizada'
    ELSE 'Barberia creada'
  END AS message,

  (SELECT nombre FROM result LIMIT 1) AS nombre,
  (SELECT owner_id FROM result LIMIT 1) AS owner_id,
  (SELECT slot_min FROM result LIMIT 1) AS slot_min,
  (SELECT direccion FROM result LIMIT 1) AS direccion,
  (SELECT ciudad FROM result LIMIT 1) AS ciudad;

    NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(draft->'accesos'->'admin'->>'email', draft->'admin'->>'email', ''))), '') AS email,

    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'imagen_url', item->>'image_url', item->>'foto', '')), ''), NULL) AS imagen_url
  FROM valid_input i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(i.draft->'servicios', '[]'::jsonb)) item
),
services_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.servicios (barberia_id, nombre, duracion_min, precio, activo, imagen_url)
  SELECT barberia_id, nombre, duracion_min, precio, true, imagen_url
  FROM service_rows
  WHERE nombre IS NOT NULL
  RETURNING id
),
hour_rows AS (
  SELECT
    i.barberia_id,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(item->>'dia_semana', '')::int,
      CASE lower(trim(COALESCE(item->>'dia', item->>'day', '')))
        WHEN 'domingo' THEN 0
        WHEN 'dom' THEN 0
        WHEN 'sunday' THEN 0
        WHEN 'lunes' THEN 1
        WHEN 'lun' THEN 1
        WHEN 'monday' THEN 1
        WHEN 'martes' THEN 2
        WHEN 'mar' THEN 2
        WHEN 'tuesday' THEN 2
        WHEN 'miercoles' THEN 3
        WHEN 'miércoles' THEN 3
        WHEN 'mie' THEN 3
        WHEN 'mié' THEN 3
        WHEN 'wednesday' THEN 3
        WHEN 'jueves' THEN 4

        WHEN 'sab' THEN 6

    ) AS dia_semana,

  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(i.draft->'horarios', '[]'::jsonb)) item
),
hours_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.horarios (barberia_id, dia_semana, activo, hora_abre, hora_cierra)
  SELECT barberia_id, dia_semana, activo, hora_abre, hora_cierra

  WHERE dia_semana BETWEEN 0 AND 6 AND hora_abre IS NOT NULL AND hora_cierra IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (barberia_id, dia_semana)
  DO UPDATE SET
    activo = EXCLUDED.activo,

  RETURNING id
),
barber_cleanup AS (
  DELETE FROM public.barberos b
  USING valid_input i
  WHERE b.barberia_id = i.barberia_id
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.citas c WHERE c.barberia_id = i.barberia_id)
  RETURNING b.id
),
barber_cleanup_guard AS (
  SELECT count(*) AS total FROM barber_cleanup
),
barber_access AS (
  SELECT
    row_number() OVER () AS rn,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'nombre', item->>'name', '')), '') AS nombre,
    NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE(item->>'email', ''))), '') AS email,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'password', '')), '') AS password,
    COALESCE((item->>'activo')::boolean, true) AS activo,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(COALESCE(item->>'foto_url', item->>'foto', item->>'avatar_url', '')), ''), NULL) AS foto_url
  FROM valid_input i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(i.draft->'accesos'->'barberos', i.draft->'barberos', '[]'::jsonb)) item
),
barber_access_distinct AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (email)
    nombre,
    email,
    password
  FROM barber_access
  WHERE email IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY email, rn
),
barber_users AS (
  INSERT INTO public.usuarios (nombre, email, role, password_hash)
  SELECT
    COALESCE(nombre, 'Barbero'),
    email,
    'barbero',
    CASE WHEN password IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE public.fn_password_hash(password) END
  FROM barber_access_distinct
  ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE
  SET
    nombre = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.nombre, ''), public.usuarios.nombre),
    role = 'barbero',
    password_hash = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.password_hash, public.usuarios.password_hash)
  RETURNING id, nombre, email, role
),
unlink_previous_barbers AS (
  UPDATE public.barberos b
  SET usuario_id = NULL
  FROM barber_users bu, valid_input i
  WHERE b.usuario_id = bu.id
    AND b.barberia_id <> i.barberia_id
  RETURNING b.id, b.nombre, b.barberia_id
),
unlink_guard AS (
  SELECT count(*) AS total FROM unlink_previous_barbers
),
barber_rows AS (
  SELECT
    i.barberia_id,
    ba.nombre,
    ba.activo,
    ba.foto_url,
    bu.id AS usuario_id
  FROM valid_input i
  JOIN barber_access ba ON true
  LEFT JOIN barber_users bu ON bu.email = ba.email
  CROSS JOIN unlink_guard ug
  WHERE ba.nombre IS NOT NULL
),
barbers_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.barberos (barberia_id, nombre, activo, foto_url, usuario_id)
  SELECT barberia_id, nombre, activo, foto_url, usuario_id
  FROM barber_rows
  RETURNING id, nombre, usuario_id
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'ok', true,
  'barberia', (SELECT row_to_json(owner_update) FROM owner_update LIMIT 1),
  'admin', (SELECT row_to_json(admin_upsert) FROM admin_upsert LIMIT 1),
  'servicios_insertados', (SELECT count(*) FROM services_insert),
  'horarios_insertados', (SELECT count(*) FROM hours_insert),
  'barberos_insertados', (SELECT count(*) FROM barbers_insert),
  'barberos_linked', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(barbers_insert) FROM barbers_insert), '[]'::json),
  'message', 'Fuente de verdad sincronizada'
) AS result;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [Number($node["Crear barberia"].json["id"] ?? 0), JSON.stringify($node["Code - session claims"].json.draft ?? $node["Code - session claims"].json ?? {})] }}
